basic_details.job_title: DRDO IRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Instruments Research & Development Establishment has released the official Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on 30 April 2026 at the official website www.drdo.gov.in. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the DRDO IRDE Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 28 years with a qualification of B.Tech/B.E. or M.E./M.Tech. in relevant discipline with 1st Division and valid NET/GATE can apply offline up to 21 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application form link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age Relaxation: Relaxable to the candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes and OBC as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. or M.E./M.Tech. in relevant discipline (Electronics Engineering, Physics, Computer Science, Mechanical Engineering) with 1st Division and valid NET/GATE from UGC recognized University
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (Electronics Engineering): B.Tech/B.E in 1st Division in Electronics Engg. from UGC recognized University with valid NET/GATE OR M.E./M.Tech. in Electronics Engg. with 1st Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level from UGC recognized University. Junior Research Fellow (Physics): M.Sc. in Physics (1st Division) with valid NET/GATE OR M.E./M.Tech in Physics with 1st Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level from UGC recognized University. Junior Research Fellow (Computer Science): B.Tech/B.E in 1st Division in Computer Science from UGC recognized University with valid NET/GATE OR M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science with 1st Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level from UGC recognized University. Junior Research Fellow (Mechanical Engineering): B.Tech/B.E in 1st Division in Mechanical Engg. from UGC recognized University with valid NET/GATE OR M.E./M.Tech. in Mechanical Engg. with 1st Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level from UGC recognized University.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- Per Month + House Rent Allowance (as admissible)

selection_process: Screening of applications by constituted committee Shortlisting based on valid GATE score and percentage of marks in qualifying degree Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO IRDE Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DRDO IRDE Junior Research Fellow positions is 21st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E. or M.E./M.Tech. in relevant disciplines like Electronics Engineering, Physics, Computer Science, or Mechanical Engineering with a first division and a valid NET/GATE score from a UGC recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow posts at Instruments Research & Development Establishment (DRDO IRDE).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow posts is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 10/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DRDO IRDE Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications, shortlisting based on GATE score and marks, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Instruments Research & Development Establishment located?
faq.answer: Instruments Research & Development Establishment is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 248008.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided to candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes (OBC) as per the Government of India norms.
